name: Mystery Chef Blueberry Pie Gngm74b
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash 1 cup of blueberries.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, stir together sugar and cornstarch until smooth.
3. Gradually stir in the water until smooth.
4. Stir in the mashed blueberries and lemon rind.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and boiling.
6. Boil for 1 minute, then turn into a bowl and cover with wax paper to cool.
7. Fold in the remaining berries.
8. Whip cream until it doubles in volume.
9. Spread 1 1/2 cups of whipped cream over the bottom and up the sides of the pie shell.
10. Fill with blueberry mixture.
11. Garnish with the remaining whipped cream.
12. Chill until set, about 3 hours.
